[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / createGlyphRamp

# Method: createGlyphRamp()

```ts
createGlyphRamp(characters): TextmodeGlyphRamp;
```

Create a reusable glyph ramp from a character sequence.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `characters` | `string` | Character sequence ordered from low to high. |

## Returns

[`TextmodeGlyphRamp`](../../TextmodeGlyphRamp.md)

A TextmodeGlyphRamp instance.

## Example
